channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Israel says it killed Iran’s intelligence minister in overnight strike - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. Israel says it killed Iran’s intelligence minister in overnight strike  The Washington Post

item.description:
1. Trump Muses About Leaving Iran ‘Finished Off’ and Abandoning Allied Ships  WSJ

  5. Opinion | The Allies Take a Pass on Iran  WSJ

item.title: Both sides in Iran war ratchet up attacks on energy facilities, as oil prices surge - AP News
item.description:
1. Both sides in Iran war ratchet up attacks on energy facilities, as oil prices surge  AP News

  3. Oil nears $110 a barrel after gas field strike  BBC

  5. Oil prices jump following first attacks on Iranian production facilities  CNN

item.title: Benjamin Netanyahu’s Iran ‘fixation’ finds its moment in Donald Trump - Financial Times
item.description:
1. Benjamin Netanyahu’s Iran ‘fixation’ finds its moment in Donald Trump  Financial Times

  4. The post-October 7 Wars in Iran and Lebanon Are Turning Into Netanyahu's Vietnam  Haaretz

item.title: Ancient skeleton unearthed in France is latest to be found sitting upright - The Guardian
item.description: Ancient skeleton unearthed in France is latest to be found sitting upright  The Guardian

item.title: About 90 ships cross the Strait of Hormuz as Iran exports millions of barrels of oil despite the war - AP News

item.title: Iran Gets a Vote in This War - by Mark Hertling - The Bulwark
item.description:
1. Iran Gets a Vote in This War - by Mark Hertling  The Bulwark

item.source: Institute for the Study of War

item.title: Iran war pushes Asian nations into energy triage as they conserve power - PBS
item.description:
1. Iran war pushes Asian nations into energy triage as they conserve power  PBS

  3. Iran war energy shock sparks global push to reduce fossil fuel dependence  Reuters
  4. The Iran War Is Pushing Some Countries to Cut Back On Energy Use  The New York Times
  5. Use the stairs, work from home: Asia is already making big changes as oil prices spike  NBC News

item.title: Live Updates: Iran launches deadly missile attacks on Israel, Gulf states as war spirals - CBS News
item.description:
1. Live Updates: Iran launches deadly missile attacks on Israel, Gulf states as war spirals  CBS News
